title: schedonorus × loliaceus
intro: Schedonorus × loliaceus, also known as Sweet Vernal Grass or Milium effusum, is a hybrid grass species native to Europe, known for its fragrant and allergenic properties. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The medicinal properties of Schedonorus × loliaceus have been associated with health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and aiding in the treatment of allergies. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
